item.title: Why the US government shut down Anthropic’s latest Claude AI model
These 4 Artificial Intelligence Stocks Have Room to Run Thanks to Anthropic's New Fable Model
How a 90-minute White House deadline sparked Silicon Valley’s biggest AI fight

US government warned Anthropic that Fable 5 had been jailbroken, but firm 'refused' to fix before US implemented export controls — Anthropic defended its decision by saying the jailbreak 'isn’t serious,' Chinese group had reportedly accessed model

item.title: ‘Toy Story 5’ and the great debate over AI’s threat to childhood
item.description: Young children develop emotional intelligence through human relationships, not through machines designed to maximize engagement.
